scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=2 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=BroadWorks 653855355 1 IN IP4 10.32.75.9 s=- c=IN IP4 10.32.75.9 t=0 0 m=audio 51052 RTP/AVP 18 0 101 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=ptime:20 a=fmtp:18 annexb=no

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=2 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=BroadWorks 653855355 1 IN IP4 10.32.75.9 s=- c=IN IP4 10.32.75.9 t=0 0 m=audio 51052 RTP/AVP 18 0 101 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=ptime:20 a=fmtp:18 annexb=no
